description: Classic 1999 IDS benchmark with synthetic traffic: DoS, Probe, R2L, U2R attacks.
Improved KDD variant removing redundant samples; same four attack families for IDS benchmarking.
Enterprise-network dataset with 13 labeled botnet scenarios (e.g., Neris, Rbot, Menti).
Feature-based dataset from Dalhousie NIMS Lab with benign and multiple real botnet families.
Early ISCX dataset combining benign traffic with botnet, DDoS, brute-force and HTTP-DoS attacks.
Malware Capture Facility Project offering real-world malware traces including botnets, trojans, DoS, exploits.
Multi-day labeled network dataset containing HTTP-DoS, DDoS and brute-force attacks.
Packet-level subset targeting evaluation of application-layer Slow-HTTP-DoS attacks.
Popular benchmark with benign traffic and 9 labeled attack families (e.g., Exploits, Recon).
Multi-day synthetic yet diverse dataset with benign traffic plus DoS/DDoS, Botnet, Web and brute-force.
Larger successor of CIC-IDS-2017 combining benign traffic and a broad attack mix.
Targeted benchmark for DDoS research with 12 DDoS variants.
Packet-level IoT traffic traces from 10 consumer devices collected.
Large-scale IoT-botnet dataset ( 70M flows) with benign smart-home traffic plus DDoS, DoS, recon, keylogging, exfiltration.
Feature-only dataset from 9 IoT devices infected by Mirai and Gafgyt botnets plus benign activity.
Smart-home IoT traffic captured from 28 devices over 26 weeks for behavioral analysis.
IoT dataset providing benign and attack traces including Mirai, DoS and data-exfiltration scenarios.
Collection of 20 IoT-malware scenarios (e.g., Mirai, Gafgyt) with labeled benign and malicious traffic.
Feature-based dataset of benign IoT-device traffic for identification and fingerprinting studies.
Medical-IoT malware dataset capturing realistic benign hospital-IoT traffic and IoT-botnet attacks.
IoT dataset from phones, cameras, TVs under nine cyber-attacks including scanning, spoofing, brute-force.
Industrial/IoT dataset with benign traffic plus DoS, reconnaissance, Mirai-style botnets and ransomware.
Red-team/blue-team cyber-exercise traces from 2017-2018 Locked Shields cyber-defence competitions.
Automotive CAN-bus IDS dataset with benign in-vehicle traffic plus fuzzing and DoS attacks.
Automotive CAN-bus injection dataset containing spoofing and malicious frame-injection attacks.
SDN-based IDS dataset with benign OpenFlow traffic and attacks such as DDoS, MITM, probing.
Wireless-sensor-network security dataset containing benign activity and DoS, probe, sinkhole attacks.
ICS dataset from gas-pipeline testbed with benign traffic plus DoS, spoofing and command-injection.
Multi-source IIoT dataset combining network-flows, telemetry and logs with DoS, scanning, ransomware, botnets.
EV-charging dataset releasing both packet and flow traces with benign traffic and several cyber-attacks.
Continuous backbone Internet traces with anomaly labels, widely used for anomaly-based IDS evaluation.
Continuous Internet-measurement dataset from distributed probes providing latency, routing and reachability telemetry.
Traffic-as-image dataset of 10 encrypted malware families versus 10 benign applications for CNN-based IDS.
Feature-based router SNMP-MIB dataset with eight traffic classes including floods, Slowloris and brute-force.
Packet-level enterprise-network trace from Kitsune with benign flows plus labeled Mirai traffic.
Adversarially perturbed botnet-flow features (from CTU-13, CIC-IDS-2018, Botnet-2014) generated by deep-reinforcement-learning agents.
Feature-based SDN-testbed dataset of port-statistics with five intrusion types and benign traffic.
Robotics-IDS dataset (ROS) containing benign traffic plus DoS, replay and hijacking attacks.
Internet-of-Vehicles dataset combining benign vehicular traffic with DoS, MITM and botnet scenarios.
